## Description


## How to test
1. Pull the latest changes from this branch
1. Ensure that you are using recommended Node.js version
1. Initial setup for the project:
    ```bash
    npm start
    ```
> Add any additional steps to test the changes here.

## Code review checklist
Please check everything that applies for this PR.

### Necessary checks
- [ ] PR title follows the [conventional commits] format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `doc:` ...) and summarizes what is changing
- [ ] PR description explains what is changing and why
- [ ] PR closes issues it addresses
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated after the PR has been created.

### Optional checks
- [ ] "How to test" has been provided
- [ ] Main process `npm run build` has been run and package `dist/` directories
  are updated and committed.
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover the changes
- [ ] Inline documentation (JSDoc) has been added or updated to cover the
  changes

[conventional commits]: https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/
